title: Spergula longipes
taxonomy: Spergula longipes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Spergula, which consists of annual or biennial plants native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The species Spergula longipes is part of the order Caryophyllales. This classification places it among other plants like carnations and pinks, which share similar characteristics. Spergula longipes is further identified by its scientific name and binomial nomenclature.
